budgetEvidence.hardwareTimingRationale: A 70224-cycle DMG frame permits one complete fixed-pool update plus a VBlank OAM projection; accepted logical spawns must reach retained OAM by the following frame.
budgetEvidence.productionTraceRationale: The production timer requests a shot every ten ticks; the two-slot hero pool must drop requests while full, despawn offscreen, reuse both slots, and publish each accepted spawn within one frame.
